Bash(npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT wp.id, wp.acceptance_id, wp.created_at, wp.survey_status, a.company_name FROM website_projects wp JOIN acceptances a ON a.id = wp.acceptance_id ORDER BY a.timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;")
